microsoft_ft: Architected Azure's **recovery validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a scalable, self-service system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and delivering **$14M+ impact** across AI-native enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling APIs that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled distributed data teams to run drills independently at scale.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model for cloud infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract across distributed cloud environments.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to support strategic AI-native customers.

Validated partner integrations with Databricks, NetApp, and SAP across Azure cloud services, stress-testing **data pipeline resilience** and surfacing architectural gaps before production impact reached enterprise customers.

Defined technical architecture standards for resilience workflows across **distributed systems**, collaborating with cloud engineering and field teams to align best practices with sovereign-cloud and multi-region deployment constraints.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-powered code generation** adoption across Azure, conducting technical demos and training sessions that activated 14 engineering teams and saved **37 hours monthly** — mirroring the SA motion of building technical champions within a customer org.

Shaped the product roadmap to prioritize **intent-based YAML generation** by running 11+ structured interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical workflow gaps and translating user feedback into actionable feature requirements.

Accelerated data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving data integrity for distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ cross-functional teams on a unified automation prioritization framework — demonstrating the consultative, multi-stakeholder influence central to a Solutions Architect role.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical-path workflows, reducing operational drag across distributed cloud infrastructure deployments.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling engineering leadership to prioritize high-impact investment areas and align roadmap execution with measurable cloud operations outcomes.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ stations — analogous to validating integrations across a complex distributed systems environment.

Prioritized a backlog of **40+ high-severity tickets** through Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional engineering execution across IT, Operations, and Robotics teams.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable release model for distributed robotic infrastructure.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal lifecycle for 200+ monthly bids via a new CRM system — building the customer-facing technical workflow discipline central to pre-sales Solutions Architecture.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital touchpoints and aligning messaging to customer segments identified through analytics.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to surface margin leaks, delivering a financial model that directly informed strategic investment and operational prioritization across service lines.
